# Hyperfluid Provider

Manage Hyperfluid platform resources through the Console external API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "hyperfluid" {
  # Console API base URL (or HYPERFLUID_ENDPOINT).
  endpoint = "https://console.example.com"

  # Path to the service-account JSON downloaded from the console
  # (the same file hfctl consumes). May also be set via HYPERFLUID_CREDENTIALS.
  # organization_id is read from this file unless overridden here.
  credentials_file = "~/.hyperfluid/sa.json"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `credentials_file` (String) Path to the service-account JSON (the same file hfctl consumes). Falls back to `HYPERFLUID_CREDENTIALS`. The secret is never written to state.
- `endpoint` (String) Console API base URL. Falls back to `HYPERFLUID_ENDPOINT`, then `console_url` in the credentials file.
- `organization_id` (String) Organization ID. Falls back to `HYPERFLUID_ORGANIZATION_ID`, then the credentials file.
